name: hirey
description: Hirey Hi as a native OpenClaw plugin: registers Hi tools, the agent-events claim service, and webhook ingress directly inside the gateway process — zero independent daemons, no `mcp.servers.hi` indirection, no per-run frozen tool inventory boundary. Same business logic as @hirey/hi-mcp-server / @hirey/hi-agent-receiver, but wired through OpenClaw's native register(api) instead of stdio MCP + spawned daemon. For OpenClaw 5.4+; OpenClaw 4.23 ~ 5.3 users install the prod ClawHub bundle clawhub:hirey-compatible instead.

install.minHostVersionComment: 实测过：OpenClaw 4.23 / 4.25 装 ClawPack 报 'requires plugin API 1.0, but this OpenClaw runtime exposes 2026.4.x'（4.x runtime 还在用日期格式版本号，不接受语义化 pluginApi=1.0）；5.2 装报 'missing sha256hash and usable files[] metadata for fallback archive verification'（ClawHub server 没给老 5.2 客户端兜底 metadata）。最早能稳装 ClawPack 的 OpenClaw 是 5.4。4.23 ~ 5.3 用户装 prod bundle clawhub:hirey-compatible 走 zip 路径。
